mapper.sql: id, kb_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_hash, chunk_size, parse_type, status, chunk_count, parse_progress, error_message, metadata, create_by, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_document (kb_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_hash, chunk_size, parse_type, status, chunk_count, parse_progress, error_message, metadata, create_by) VALUES (#{kbId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{fileHash}, #{chunkSize}, #{parseType}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'pending'), COALESCE(#{chunkCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{parseProgress}, 0), #{errorMessage}, #{metadata}::jsonb, COALESCE(#{createBy}, 'system'))
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_document SET parse_progress = #{progress} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_document SET chunk_count = #{chunkCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM kb_document WHERE status = 'embedding' ORDER BY update_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
